series_metadata.series_description: Files contain 2 year plans created in administration of the federal Social Service Block Grant Title XX Program. Includes state level plans and county social service plans and related program correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 4 years, then destroy provided state and federal audits have been completed and released, all discrepancies are resolved, and the State Archives have reviewed for possible retention. ; Electronic: Retain in office 4 years, then destroy provided state and federal audits have been completed and released, all discrepancies are resolved, and the State Archives have reviewed for possible retention., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
